title: Natural Village-Adjacent Survival Run
description: A normal seeded survival world using a previously scouted village-adjacent natural spawn. It keeps generated terrain and structures intact while avoiding dense-forest spawn traps that waste turns before any meaningful action-consequence evidence exists.
world_event_summary: Current local task: begin from the validated natural village-adjacent start, use naturally generated village and terrain affordances, and produce observable physical/material/social deltas. The seed was selected to avoid dense-forest spawn traps, but no terrain, resources, pads, starter structures, or inventory are granted by setup.
notes: This scenario uses the prior seed-scout candidate `plains-village-cherry-nearby` with seed `4167799982467607063`.
Loaded-world evidence from that seed scout observed village-adjacent blocks including dirt_path, oak_planks, cobblestone, oak_door, torch, oak_fence, and mossy_cobblestone near the validated start.
It is natural-world testing, not a fixture: setup must not use fill, setblock, resource racks, cleared pads, or starter structures.
If safe-spawn validation fails, record setup/environment failure rather than counting wasted Actor Turn cycles as behavior.
